skill.name: nerdzao-elite-gemini-high
skill.description: Modo Elite Coder + UX Pixel-Perfect otimizado especificamente para Gemini 3.1 Pro High. Workflow completo com foco em qualidade máxima e eficiência de tokens.
skill.summary: Modo Elite Coder + UX Pixel-Perfect otimizado especificamente para Gemini 3.1 Pro High. Workflow com...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 5 high-risk patterns related to 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. Evaluation reveals these are FALSE POSITIVES - the Portuguese-language skill file contains no cryptographic code. The scanner misidentified Portuguese text fragments as cryptographic references. This is a simple workflow prompt skill with no security concerns.

content.value_statement: Developers need structured, high-quality code generation workflows. This skill provides a complete elite developer workflow optimized for Gemini 3.1 Pro High with pixel-perfect UI validation.
actual_capabilities: Provides complete software development workflow for Gemini 3.1 Pro High
Implements elite-level coding standards with 15+ years of expertise
Enforces pixel-perfect UI and UX validation
Applies TDD methodology with production-grade testing
Validates code quality through linting and production audits
Optimizes for token efficiency in high-performance mode
limitations: Language is primarily Portuguese - may require translation for English users
Requires Gemini 3.1 Pro (High tier) for optimal results
References other skills that must be available in the workspace

use_cases.title: Full-Stack Development
use_cases.description: Use complete workflow for building production applications with proper architecture, testing, and UI validation

use_cases.title: UI/UX Quality Assurance
use_cases.description: Ensure pixel-perfect interface output with visual validation and correction of design issues
use_cases.target_user: Frontend developers focused on UI quality

use_cases.title: Code Review and Audit
use_cases.description: Validate code quality, security, and production readiness before delivery

prompt_templates.title: Basic Development Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a feature using the complete elite workflow: planning, architecture, TDD implementation, production code, and UI validation.

prompt_templates.title: Frontend with UI Focus
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a UI component with strict pixel-perfect validation. Include visual checks for colors, spacing, alignment, currency formatting (R$), and responsiveness.

prompt_templates.title: Full Application Scaffold
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a complete application structure using elite architect mode, then implement with TDD, production-grade code, and verification before completion.

prompt_templates.title: Code Quality Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Review the provided code using production code audit and verification before completion skills. Check for security, performance, and best practices.

output_examples.input: Build a login form with validation
output_examples.output: Complete implementation with: 1) Planning phase with concise planning and brainstorming, 2) Architecture design with senior architect patterns, 3) TDD implementation with test cases, 4) Production-grade clean code, 5) UI validation checking all visual elements are pixel-perfect, 6) Final verification with kaizen improvements.

Full dashboard with: component architecture, responsive design, proper color hierarchy, alignment checks, spacing validation, currency formatting (R$ XX,XX with comma), and production code audit results.

best_practices: Activate the workflow for every task - it covers the full development lifecycle
Always wait for UI validation to complete before accepting code output
Use chain-of-thought reasoning for complex architectural decisions
anti_patterns: Skipping UI validation - the skill specifically requires pixel-perfect validation
Ignoring the token-efficient mode - use concise responses
Using with non-High tier Gemini - the skill is optimized for High tier

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill instructions are in Portuguese. It can work with any programming language for code generation.

faq.question: Does this work with Claude or only Gemini?
faq.answer: This skill is optimized for Gemini 3.1 Pro High but can be adapted for Claude and Claude Code workflows.

faq.question: What other skills does this reference?
faq.answer: It references skills like @concise-planning, @senior-architect, @test-driven-development, @ui-visual-validator, and others that should be available.

faq.question: Is this suitable for beginners?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for experienced developers seeking elite-level production workflows.

faq.question: How does UI validation work?
faq.answer: The skill includes @ui-visual-validator and @ui-ux-pro-max which check for visual issues like color inconsistency, alignment, spacing, and currency formatting.

faq.question: What makes this 'Elite' mode?
faq.answer: Elite mode combines senior software engineer expertise with senior product designer skills for maximum quality output.
